stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Calculate the de-factored distance for TODA that could be used to enter the take-off performance graph for a multi-engined piston aeroplane used for Commercial Air Transport, given the following information:

Take-Off Distance Available: 2300 ft
Runway slope: 1% downslope
Runway surface: paved, dry
Aerodrome field lengths: unbalanced
